evaluations.query: I need to grade LLM output against assertions in my eval pipeline
expected_behavior: Recommends a `claude -p --bare` invocation for the isolated grading call
Includes `--max-turns 1` so the grader cannot drift across multiple turns
Frames the command around deterministic grading of the stated assertions

evaluations.query: Test which skill a prompt triggers without loading all plugins
expected_behavior: Recommends `--bare` to classify trigger routing without plugin or hook interference
Uses `--json-schema` to constrain the classification result to structured output
Explains that isolation keeps the trigger test independent of the full plugin set

evaluations.query: Test skill routing with a plugin loaded to verify agent spawning
expected_behavior: Recommends `--plugin-dir` because the test genuinely needs the plugin loaded
Does NOT recommend `--bare` when plugin or agent-spawning behavior must be verified

evaluations.query: Set up --bare mode for my CI pipeline
expected_behavior: States that `--bare` mode requires `ANTHROPIC_API_KEY` to be exported in the environment
Mentions the `BARE_MODE` configuration switch when wiring it into CI

evaluations.query: Fix the login bug in the auth middleware
expected_behavior: Does not engage the bare-eval skill for an ordinary bug-fixing task
Recognizes that middleware debugging is unrelated to isolated eval or grading invocations
